content:
蒲公英随风飞散，幻梦般的世界逐渐剥离。
被唤醒的沙耶，被定格的表情，正常而又鲜活。
「弥萨格的冰箱里会有什么呢？」
「要来吃果冻么？」「这个，这个，除去这些全部打包~」

🥰 沙耶表情
现已添加为本服务器的表情符号。表情原图已分享在本帖下方以及官方素材频道。欢迎守密人分享、使用~

全部10款沙耶表情也将通过游戏邮件发放给全体玩家！

与此同时，欢迎各位前往各大游戏商店提交对《忘却前夜》的评价<:saya_09:1513077952990937200> ！

✦ Steam: https://bit.ly/morimenssteam
✦ AppStore: https://apple.co/44LJBFO
✦ GooglePlay: https://bit.ly/morimensgoogle
✦ ......

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Dandelions scatter on the wind, as the dreamlike world gradually peels away.
The awakened Saya, her expression frozen in time — ordinary, yet vividly alive.

"I wonder what's in Mythag's fridge?"
"Want some jelly?" "This one, and this one—I'll have everything except these~"

🥰 Saya Emotes
Now added as emotes on the official server!
The original emote images will be shared below this thread as well as in the official assets channel.
Feel free to share and use them!

All 10 of Saye’s emojis will also be distributed to all keepers via in-game mail!

In the meantime, we’d love for you to head over to the major app stores and leave a review for Morimens.

✦ Steam: https://bit.ly/morimenssteam
✦ App Store: https://apple.co/44LJBFO
✦ Google Play: https://bit.ly/morimensgoogle
✦ ......

embeds.title: Morimens on Steam
embeds.description: Morimens is a roguelite card-battler inspired by the Lovecraftian mythos. Bond with a diverse cast of Awakeners, build your perfect deck, and battle through the mists of Kadath—facing wild events and uncovering maddening truths at every turn.

embeds.title: 《忘卻前夜 Morimens》App - App Store
embeds.description: 在 App Store 下載「Qookka Games」的《忘卻前夜 Morimens》。查看螢幕截圖、評分與評論、用户貼士，以及更多類似《忘卻前夜 Morimens》的 App。
